title: App Rate plugin is not having the arabic support and need customization to keep it more dynamic.
author: xmmani-rakbank
body:
Hi Team,

We have installed cordova app rate plugin and we are facing the below issues.

1. Buttons are getting rendered horizontally for arabic and vertically for english in android.
2. Arabic text rendering is incorrect and its not rendering properly from right to left .
3. Few symbols (Like exclamatory symbol is getting rendered in reverse direction).

- Please provide additional configuration parameters to make it compatible with different languages.

title: promptAgainForEachNewVersion setting is ignored
author: yjseo29
body:
Hello,
First of all, thank you for developing the plugin.

The promptAgainForEachNewVersion setting is ignored.
Looking at the code, when the "deviceready" event occurs, "AppRate.init()" Run the function.
https://github.com/pushandplay/cordova-plugin-apprate/blob/87be3ef148798a004857f85ec26c31beea53852b/www/AppRate.js#L345-L347

The "AppRate.init()" function performs the "promptAgainForEachNewVersion" function.
https://github.com/pushandplay/cordova-plugin-apprate/blob/87be3ef148798a004857f85ec26c31beea53852b/www/AppRate.js#L258-L265

Since the "AppRate.init()" function is executed first by the "deviceready" event, setting "AppRate.setPreferences" is ignored.
Please take a look.
thank you

title: Compiling targetSDK=34, com.google.android.play:core
author: graphefruit
body:
Hey there,
I've just published a new release of my app, and updated to targetSDK 34, and got following information of android:

If your app is targeting SDK 34+ (targetSdkVersion), then the PlayCore SDK is outdated and will likely cause crashes in your app! Please update: https://developer.android.com/guide/playcore#playcore-migration

Is there any plans to upgrade to the kotlin libraries?

title: BSF Cordova Ecosystem Crowdfunding Plan
author: zzz131519
body:
Hello everyone,

I'm Jason.z, the founder of [BSF](https://byteee.fund).

We've noticed that this project has remained very popular in the past.

However, unfortunately, it seems that this project has not been maintained for some time,

which is unfortunate for users who want to continue using and supporting the project.


Based on this, BSF has initiated the **Cordova Ecosystem Crowdfunding Plan** ,

with the main purpose of addressing the upgrading and maintenance of old Cordova projects,

as well as compatibility and adaptability for new platforms.

You can learn more about it by clicking on this [link](https://byteee.fund/post/bsf-cordova-crowdfunding-plan).

So, if you feel that this project needs continued upgrading and maintenance,

please let us know through [voting](https://github.com/byteee-fund/bsf-crowdfunding-plan/discussions/3).

We will decide whether to launch a crowdfunding plan for this project based on the voting results and the recruitment of maintainers,

as well as the subsequent development and maintenance plans.

If you are willing to be a long-term maintainer of the project, you can also contact us.



Of course, if you do not agree with the operating model of BSF Software Foundation,

or if you are a maintenance team for this project and believe that this ISSUE infringes and damages your rights,

you can also delete this ISSUE.

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.



BSF is our bold attempt and exploration of the sustainable development of software projects.

We hope to contribute to the development of software projects through the power of the community!

title: IOS 17.0.1 - Error "Call must be made on main thread"
author: Bradrickcruz
body:
# Environment
macOS Sonoma 14.0
Cordova 10.0.0
cordova-ios 6.2
Xcode 15.0.1

Trying run app on "iPad(10th gen) 17.0.1"

# Issue
When my app runs ```AppRate.navigateToAppStore();```, it crashes the app. It seems occur because it runs on another thread not the main thread on iOS devices. The error log is below:
![erro_ipad](https://github.com/pushandplay/cordova-plugin-apprate/assets/38919411/49b322c2-695b-4c30-afdd-dff2b62744ca)

On iOS 16 devices it still working fine, but on iOS 17+ not.
How could I change the thread that calls this function to the main thread?

title: iOS- InAppReview popup for rating is taking device language.
author: Dimpy27
body:
We are setting below preference still getting Rating Popup with stars in Spanish.

simpleMode:true,
storeAppURL: {
ios: appDetails.appstoreURL,
android: appDetails.playStoreURL},
showPromptForInAppReview:false,
reviewType:{
ios:AppRateReviewTypeIos.InAppReview,
android:AppRateReviewTypeAndroid.InAppBrowser},
customLocale:{message: 'Message'}

Even if we use useLanguage: 'es' in preference it will not change language of Rating Pop-up language in iOS.

title: Change buttons position
author: mayankkataria
body: I think, providing noButtonLabel on right hand side and yesButtonLabel on left hand side is not a nice way to get positive feedback and also not user friendly. Therefore it'd be better if Yes and No label positions are swapped in a plugin or developer is provided an option to change buttons position based on their respective index. This issue is described over [here](https://forum.ionicframework.com/t/changing-apprate-plugin-button-position/22346) as well.

title: Detect if app is already rated
author: KrzysztofMoskalik
body:
Hi, 

I'm using this plugin with SimpleMode. 
Is there any way to detect if user actually leaves AppStore or Google Play with app rated?
Using callback for rateButton (index 3 in onButtonClicked) is only telling me that user opened AppStore or Google Play, not that he rate the app.
